Accept payments via FreeKassa — a popula: Accept payments via FreeKassa — a popular Russian payment aggregator. Configure your merchant credentials to enable RUB top-ups.
How much currency the user pays per $1 o: How much currency the user pays per $1 of quota. E.g. 90 means ₽90 = $1 quota.
Set this URL in your FreeKassa merchant: Set this URL in your FreeKassa merchant dashboard under «Технические настройки».
